title: Pench Tiger Reserve
tagline: Pench Tiger Reserve — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Pench Tiger Reserve is a tiger reserve in India straddling across Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra.
overview.description: Pench Tiger Reserve is a tiger reserve in India straddling across Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra. On the Madhya Pradesh side, it encompasses a core area of 411.33 km2 (158.82 sq mi), with a buffer of 768.3 km2 (296.6 sq mi), making for a total protected area of 1,179.63 km2 (455.46 sq mi). On the Maharashtra side, the Pench Tiger Reserve has a core habitat area of 257.3 km2 (99.3 sq mi) along with a buffer zone of 483.96 km2 (186.86 sq mi) making total protected area of 741.2 km2 (286.2 sq mi). topPlaces.name: Totaladoh
topPlaces.description: Totaladoh is a census town in Nagpur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Totladoh Dam
topPlaces.description: Totladoh dam, is a gravity dam on the Pench river near Ramtek in Nagpur district in the state of Maharashtra and adjoining Madhya Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Pench National Park
topPlaces.description: Pench National Park is a national park in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It was created in 1983 with an area of 292.85 km2 (113.07 sq mi) in the Seoni and Chhindwara districts.

items.note: Totaladoh is a census town in Nagpur district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
Totladoh dam, is a gravity dam on the Pench river near Ramtek in Nagpur district in the state of Maharashtra and adjoining Madhya Pradesh in India.
Pench National Park is a national park in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It was created in 1983 with an area of 292.85 km2 (113.07 sq mi) in the Seoni and Chhindwara districts.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pench Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pench Tiger Reserve is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pench Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pench Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pench Tiger Reserve at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pench Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: Stays in Pench Tiger Reserve start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pench Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The top attractions are Totaladoh, Totladoh Dam, Pench National Park.
